parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: "query GetQuotes($cursor: String) { quotes(first: 100, after: $cursor) { nodes { id quoteNumber quoteStatus createdAt sentAt transitionedAt amounts { total } client { name } salesperson { id name { full } } } pageInfo { endCursor hasNextPage } } }", variables: { cursor: $json.cursor || null } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ query: "query GetRequests($cursor: String) { requests(first: 100, after: $cursor) { nodes { id createdAt client { name } } pageInfo { endCursor hasNextPage } } }", variables: { cursor: $json.cursor || null } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ query: "query GetClients($cursor: String, $filter: ClientFilterAttributes) { clients(first: 100, after: $cursor, filter: $filter) { nodes { id firstName lastName createdAt } pageInfo { endCursor hasNextPage } } }", variables: { cursor: $json.cursor || null, filter: { createdAt: { after: $now.format('yyyy') + "-01-01T00:00:00Z" } } } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ query: "query GetInvoices($cursor: String) { invoices(first: 100, after: $cursor) { nodes { id invoiceNumber createdAt issuedDate amounts { total invoiceBalance } } pageInfo { endCursor hasNextPage } } }", variables: { cursor: $json.cursor || null } }) }}
